name: read_structured_at_application_boundary
details: Structured payload and optional _meta enter the application scope. Metadata provenance may be uncertain.

name: reseed_or_configure_required_intent
details: Bootstrap, heuristic configuration, or validation steps restore required intent after boundary crossing.

name: forward_projection
details: Roundtrip-capable projections transform structured data into a human-editable shape.

name: render_and_write_workbook
details: Rendering derives workbook layout and spreadsheet adapters write the workbook artifact.

name: human_edit_and_readback
details: Human edits are read back from the workbook together with carried metadata or read-path intent.

name: inverse_recomposition
details: Inverse projections interpret edits and reconstruct the structured representation.

name: pre_persistence_infrastructure
details: Cleanup, prune, validation, and promotion steps run before structured persistence.

name: write_structured_data
details: Structured payload is written, with metadata according to the workflow's persistence policy.
